---
title: "Aqaba Case 001"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.manta-case-intro}
## Overview

This case presents a single-frame gallery-ready export from a D-Claw landslide-tsunami simulation in the Gulf of Aqaba.

The terrain is displayed as a static high-resolution topographic and bathymetric surface. The water surface is colored by wave amplitude using the **Tsunami** theme, while the landslide material layer carries `hm`, `m`, and `Δb` fields for interactive scalar switching in the browser viewer.
:::

::: {.manta-case-hero}
```{=html}
<div id="aqaba-viewer" class="manta-viewer">
  <div class="manta-viewer-status">
    Loading MANTA Gallery viewer...
  </div>
</div>
<script type="module" src="../assets/js/aqaba_case_001_viewer.bundle.js"></script>
```
:::

<details class="manta-foldout">
<summary>Current export settings</summary>

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Source | FORT-native |
| Frame index | `20` |
| Terrain stride | `5` |
| Water stride | `20` |
| Landslide stride | `5` |
| Terrain reuse | Single static `terrain.vtp` reused across frames; DEM is not regenerated or updated online during playback. |
| Landslide ROI | Global union over all `72` frames |
| Landslide ROI pad | `24` cells |
| Water threshold | `m <= 0.3` |
| Landslide threshold | `m >= 0.0` |

</details>

<details class="manta-foldout">
<summary>Layer styles</summary>

| Layer | Style |
|---|---|
| DEM bathymetry | Sea-split target: `cmocean.deep`; currently kept as a static gray relief surface. |
| DEM topography | Sea-split target: `cmcrameri.grayC + relief / hillshade`; terrain is exported at higher resolution than water frames. |
| Water surface | Scalar = `wave_amplitude`; theme = `dclaw.tsunami` / **Tsunami**; robust symmetric display range. |
| Landslide | Scalar selector = `hm / m / Δb`; colormap = `magma`. |

</details>
